source:
import Svg, { Defs, Image, Pattern, Rect, Use } from 'react-native-svg';

type BoldBeginnerInBoxProps = { size?: number };

export function BoldBeginnerInBox({ size = 96 }: BoldBeginnerInBoxProps) {
  return (
    <Svg
      width={size}
      height={size}
      viewBox={`0 0 ${size} ${size}`}
      fill="none"
      testID="bold-beginner-in-box"
    >
      <Rect width={size} height={size} rx="14" fill="url(#pattern0)" />
      <Defs>
        <Pattern id="pattern0" patternContentUnits="objectBoundingBox" width="1" height="1">
          <Use
            xlinkHref="#image0_3916_158023"
            transform="translate(0 -0.00526316) scale(0.00175439)"
          />
        </Pattern>
        <Image
          id="image0_3916_158023"
          width="570"
          height="576"
          xlinkHref="data:image/png;base64,"
        />
      </Defs>
    </Svg>
  );
}
